sizing_rule.note: Scale position size by probability multiplier (1.0–1.25×) relative to win probability above 50% baseline. Higher confidence trades (≥15% above baseline) receive up to 1.25× base unit size, maintaining equal risk exposure across portfolio via probability weighting.

source_rule_text: Allocate position size proportionally to the estimated probability of success for each trade, concentrating larger positions on higher-confidence opportunities while maintaining equal risk exposure across the portfolio.
